title: Bitget's VOXEL Meltdown
relevance_summary: Leveraged trading bot creating predictable price oscillations leading to market manipulation

prevention.rule: Block any tx that shows large, predictable price movements in VOXEL/USDT pair within a short timeframe
prevention.trigger: Large, predictable price movements in VOXEL/USDT pair within a short timeframe

monitoring_rules: Monitor VOXEL/USDT pair for large, predictable price movements
summary: A rogue market-making bot on Bitget caused VOXEL to experience extreme price fluctuations, allowing traders to exploit the situation for massive profits. A guard could have detected this by monitoring for large, predictable price movements in the VOXEL/USDT pair.
